meta.title: Hasan Sido — Frontend Developer
meta.description: Front end developer building responsive, modern web experiences. Currently working frontend at STP, STH's marketing agency, and building websites for clients with my own team on the side.

hero.tagline: Front end developer building responsive, modern web experiences.
hero.subline: Currently working frontend at STP — STH's marketing agency — and building websites for clients with my own team on the side.

about.title: Engineering interfaces with intent.
about.paragraph: I'm a front end developer building responsive, modern web interfaces. I currently work frontend at STP, STH's marketing agency, and alongside that I lead a small team building websites for clients. What drives me is continuous improvement and a genuine curiosity about what's next — I like to understand new technologies early and know why they matter.

skills.title: The stack I build with.
skills.subtitle: Tools I reach for to ship fast, accessible, and maintainable interfaces.

projects.title: Things I've been building.
projects.subtitle: A few projects that reflect how I think about craft, structure, and detail.

designSystem.title: Portfolio Design System
designSystem.description: A typed, themeable component system powering a multilingual, RTL-aware portfolio with orchestrated motion and a disciplined emerald accent.

dashboard.title: Analytics Dashboard
dashboard.description: A responsive dashboard exploring data-dense layouts, accessible charts, and smooth state transitions built on a clean component architecture.

contact.title: Let's build something.
contact.paragraph: I'm always happy to talk about frontend work, new opportunities, or an idea worth prototyping. The fastest way to reach me is email.

footer.builtWith: Designed & built with Next.js, TypeScript & Tailwind CSS.

notFound.title: This page wandered off.
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has moved.
